lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, preloaded for this ship.

sources.label: EDSY
sources.what: Alternate outfitting planner used to cross-check slot sizes and engineered module figures.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Type-9 Heavy ship page — manufacturer specs, feature overview, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout, passenger-cabin sizing, and engineering blueprint data.

sources.label: Inara — Type-9 Heavy
sources.what: Ship specification, base stats, and shipyard pricing for this hull.

sources.label: ED Wiki — Type-9 Heavy
sources.what: Hull role, manufacturer background, and hardpoint / internal layout.
